semantic.role: Integration test suite for the built CLI sync command and related operations.
responsibilities: Create a temporary repository fixture to isolate test environment from the actual project.
Execute the built CLI binary (dist/cli/index.js) with subcommands like sync and remove.
Verify that the sync command initializes and synchronizes a minimal project correctly.
Assert that the CLI processes exit codes, output, and file changes as expected.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual modules or internal functions.
Tests requiring external LLM, network services, or real credentials.
Performance, load, or security regression testing.
invariants: The file is a test suite (not part of the main application source).
It uses vitest (describe, it, beforeAll) and child_process (execFileSync, spawnSync).
Temporary directories are created and cleaned up per test run.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for the CLI built artifact, ensuring that after build and packaging the primary commands (sync, remove) still behave correctly.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Reflects the removal of legacy CLI aliases and related test fixes; validates that the sync command works after those changes.
